02-17.event: Dschinghis Khan wins the German national final with 'Dschinghis Khan'.
Vanna wins Dora with 'Strings of My Heart'.
Måns Zelmerlöw debuts at Melodifestivalen (Cara Mia) in Heat 3.
Silvester Belt wins Eurovizija.LT with the viral hit 'Luktelk'.
Natalia Barbu wins Etapa Națională for the second time with 'In The Middle'.

02-19.event: Frances Ruffelle wins the UK selection with 'We Will Be Free'.
Belgium is set to reveal its artist and song for Vienna.

05-24.event: The 1st Eurovision Song Contest is held in Lugano. Lys Assia wins.

04-06.event: ABBA wins Eurovision with 'Waterloo' in Brighton.

04-30.event: Celine Dion wins Eurovision with 'Ne partez pas sans moi'.

05-16.event: Alexander Rybak smashes records with 'Fairytale' in Moscow.

05-22.event: Måneskin brings Rock'n'Roll back to the top in Rotterdam.
